name: googleworkspace2snipe
description: Sync Google Workspace license assignments to Snipe-IT license seats

config_schema.label: Service Account Credentials File
config_schema.hint: Path to the service account JSON key file with domain-wide delegation granted

config_schema.label: Google Workspace Admin Email
config_schema.hint: Email of a super admin to impersonate — must be a super admin, not a delegated admin

config_schema.label: Snipe-IT API Key
config_schema.hint: Admin → API Keys in your Snipe-IT instance

config_schema.label: Snipe-IT License Category ID
config_schema.hint: Find at Admin → Categories (integer ID). All Google Workspace licenses share this category

config_schema.label: License Name Prefix
config_schema.hint: Optional prefix prepended to each SKU name, e.g. "Acme - "

config_schema.label: License Name Suffix
config_schema.hint: Optional suffix appended to each SKU name, e.g. " (acme.com)"

config_schema.label: Slack Webhook URL
config_schema.hint: Optional. Incoming webhook for sync notifications
